myCastleRecruitment.note: After Chapter 18 is complete, upgrade the Fire Orb to level 3 and refresh My Castle by waiting for the real-time update or by completing any map.

autoLevel.note: Controlled Conquest testing found Flora at level 5 through displayed Chapter 22, then two deterministic levels per completed story chapter through level 15 at displayed Chapter 27. Stats use (Flora's individual growth rates + Maid class growth rates) from her level 5 Conquest bases, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Difficulty does not affect these gains; exact weapon-rank milestones still need direct testing.

autoLevel.note: Flora's independently corroborated Revelation base is level 7, and its stats equal two average Maid growth levels added to her level 5 Conquest bases with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Community references place her at level 15 by displayed Chapter 27, but Revelation's complete milestone schedule and exact weapon-rank milestones still need direct testing.

autoLevel.note: Birthright's earliest Level 5 stat block is independently corroborated. At each scaled level, add (Izana's individual growth rates + Onmyoji class growth rates) multiplied by levels gained, then round each resulting stat to the nearest integer with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Later Birthright chapter milestones still need direct testing; the child unit Offspring Seal level table does not apply directly.
